domain: Sumo dohyō tachi-ai (Japanese sumo wrestling in 4.55m circular dohyō ring; tachi-ai synchronized opening charge with both rikishi committing simultaneously from shikiri-sen lines; first 1-2 seconds decisive with grip/leverage; multi-technique repertoire yorikiri/oshidashi/uwatenage/shitatenage/hatakikomi/hikiotoshi; loss by ring-exit or ground-touch)
specific_mechanism: TACHIAI-CHARGE: synchronized opening-move adversarial training for LLM defense with multi-technique repertoire + coevolution. (1) For each adv-training example, simulate synchronized tachi-ai: defender + attacker commit opening move simultaneously (defender pre-commits decode strategy g_d; attacker pre-commits prompt-injection g_a). (2) First-2-token decisive phase: defender gets bonus reward r_first = +α for safety-correct response in opening ≤ 2 tokens (counters shallow alignment shortcut). (3) Multi-technique repertoire: defender trains on 6 push-out categories (refuse / clarify / redirect / acknowledge-+-refuse / KB-anchor / format-coerce). (4) Adversarial training round: each iteration picks one defender technique + one attacker technique; both committed simultaneously then engagement loss measured. (5) Coevolution: attacker improves against current defender repertoire mix; defender updates technique distribution to counter (Nash-style mixed strategy).
llm_application: TACHIAI-CHARGE synchronized opening-move adv-training + first-2-token decisive bonus + 6-technique repertoire + Nash-style coevolution. Differs from Attacker Moves Second 2510.09023 (adaptive attacker bypasses defenses — different — attacker-moves-second not synchronized tachi-ai). Jailbreak Survey 2026 (catalog of defenses — covers but no synchronized opening + 6-technique). Continuous Adversarial Training 2604.12817 (continuous embedding adversarial search — not synchronized opening + multi-technique). AutoDefense 2403.04783 (multi-agent jailbreak defense — covers multi-defender but no synchronized opening + repertoire selection). Differs from R419 KOMI-WARD (guardian-spirit), R424 TLINGIT-POTLATCH (competitive gifting), R433 TLINGIT-CHILKAT-DRESS (break-failure penalty), R437 BERBER-AMAZIGH-ADV (4-quadrant axis defender), R459 KOMODO-DELAYED-INJECT (delayed-injection) by EXPLICIT SYNCHRONIZED TACHI-AI + FIRST-2-TOKEN BONUS + 6-TECHNIQUE NASH-STYLE COEVOLUTION.
novelty_claim: Attacker Moves Second + Jailbreak Survey + CAT + AutoDefense cover adversarial coevolution + multi-defense paradigm. TACHIAI-CHARGE adds (a) synchronized opening-move commit + (b) first-2-token decisive bonus reward + (c) 6-technique defender repertoire + (d) Nash-style mixed strategy coevolution. Recombination — adversarial training + Nash equilibria are mainstream.
